Vinyl Banners can also be used to promote sales events, like tire sales, oil change specials, car washes, trade-in specials, new car sales events and more!

Order Custom Automotive Banners for Car Dealerships & Service Centers

Make the most of your automotive promotions with eye-catching vinyl banners designed specifically for car dealerships, service centers, and automotive businesses. From seasonal sales events and new car launches to service specials and grand openings, custom automotive banners help you attract customers and boost visibility for your automotive business.

Here at Banners.com, we specialize in creating durable automotive banners that withstand outdoor conditions while maintaining vibrant colors and professional appearance. Our automotive banners are perfect for car lot installations, storefront displays, service bay promotions, and special automotive events.

We offer automotive banners in sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50' with unlimited design customization options through our online designer. Choose from multiple production times to ensure your automotive banner arrives when you need it for your car sales event or service promotion.

All automotive banners are manufactured and printed in the USA using state-of-the-art large-format printers for vibrant colors that attract customers to your automotive business. Our experienced team includes graphic designers and production experts who understand the automotive industry's unique marketing needs.

Popular Automotive Banner Applications:

  • New car sales events and promotions
  • Oil change and service specials
  • Car wash and detailing services
  • Trade-in value promotions
  • Tire sales and automotive parts
  • Grand opening announcements
  • Seasonal automotive promotions
PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Automotive Banner Material for Outdoor Car Lot Installation

Your automotive banner is manufactured with premium materials designed to withstand outdoor car lot conditions while maintaining professional appearance. All automotive banners are printed using state-of-the-art large-format printers for vibrant colors that attract customers to your dealership.

Material Size Variance: Vinyl is temperature-sensitive, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing and outdoor climate exposure. Acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot. For precision automotive installations, contact customer service.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Automotive Banners

Our most popular automotive banner material features high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl with low shine and rich color reproduction, ideal for professional automotive business displays.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Automotive Banners

Premium gloss vinyl material with high shine produces vibrant, crisp automotive graphics and promotional text for a premium dealership appearance.

18 oz Heavy-Duty Automotive Vinyl Banners

Extra heavy-duty matte vinyl with blockout coating provides maximum durability for long-term automotive lot installations and extreme weather conditions.

Mesh Automotive Banners

8 oz PVC polyester mesh material with 37% airflow prevents wind damage, making it perfect for outdoor automotive lot installations and windy car lot conditions.

Fabric Automotive Banners

Premium nylon/polyester blend Banner Soft material creates an upscale appearance for indoor automotive showroom displays and dealership events.

Adhesive Automotive Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Indoor and outdoor automotive applications with 3-5 year outdoor lifespan when properly installed.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: High-adhesion vinyl specifically designed for automotive surfaces and low-energy car lot materials.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Automotive Banner Display & Mounting

Professional finishing options ensure your automotive banners install securely and maintain their appearance throughout car lot display and outdoor automotive use.

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

One-inch heat-welded hems with grommets provide secure mounting for automotive lot installations. Available in top/bottom only or all four sides for complete automotive banner reinforcement.

Top and Bottom Hems: Standard automotive banner finishing for horizontal car lot displays.

All Four Sides Hems: Maximum reinforcement for automotive banners exposed to high winds.

Pole Pockets for Automotive Banner Display

Pole pockets create sleeves for dowel or pole installation at your automotive location:

  • 2" Pole Pockets: Fits 3/4" diameter poles for lightweight automotive displays
  • 3" Pole Pockets: Fits 1 1/4" diameter poles for standard automotive installations
  • 4" Pole Pockets: Fits 1 1/2" diameter poles for heavy-duty car lot mounting

Note: Pole pockets are not compatible with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Automotive Banner Construction

Reinforced Corners: Triangular vinyl reinforcements provide extra strength at automotive banner corners with additional grommets.

Reinforced Hems: PVC-coated webbing increases automotive banner strength for long-term car lot installations.

Double-Sided Automotive Banners

Double-sided automotive banners available up to 150 square feet for maximum car lot visibility. Larger automotive banner sizes require custom quotes.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Automotive Banner Production & Turnaround Times

Flexible production times ensure your automotive banners arrive when you need them for car sales events, service promotions, and dealership marketing campaigns.

1 Business Day Priority Automotive Banners

Emergency automotive banner production for urgent car sales events and last-minute automotive promotions.

2 Business Days Express Automotive Production

Fast turnaround for automotive banners when you have slightly more lead time for your car dealership event.

3 Business Days Standard Automotive Production

Most popular automotive banner production option, offering fast turnaround at no additional cost for most custom automotive orders.

5 Business Days Saver Automotive Production

Cost-effective automotive banner production when you have advance notice for your car dealership promotion or automotive event.

Important Production Notes:

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Emergency same-day automotive banner production may be available - contact customer service
  • Total delivery time includes both automotive banner production and shipping time
  • Production starts once file upload is complete and proof approval is given
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Automotive Banner Payment & Ordering Options

Convenient payment options for automotive dealerships, service centers, and car lot businesses ordering custom banners.

Credit Card Payments for Automotive Banners

We accept all major credit cards for automotive banner orders:

  • Visa
  • MasterCard
  • American Express
  • Discover

Check Payments for Automotive Banner Orders

Business checks accepted for automotive banner orders. Check must be received before your automotive banner order enters production.

Learn more about check payment options for automotive banners

Automotive Banner Order Processing

All automotive banners must be paid prior to production. Credit cards are not charged until you approve your automotive banner order and artwork.

For automotive dealerships with special payment requirements or volume pricing, contact customer service at (320) 391-5300.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Automotive Banner Delivery

Reliable shipping ensures your automotive banners arrive safely at your dealership or car lot location when you need them for automotive events and promotions.

Important Automotive Banner Shipping Note: Due to shipping regulations, vinyl banners exceeding 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. For unfolded automotive banner delivery, contact us for custom freight quotes.

Standard Automotive Banner Shipping Methods

  • Standard Ground (3-5 Business Days): Most cost-effective for automotive banner delivery
  • Three Day (3 Business Days): Reliable automotive banner delivery timing
  • Two Day (2 Business Days): Expedited automotive banner shipping
  • Overnight (1 Business Day): Emergency automotive banner delivery
  • UPS Overnight AM: Morning delivery for urgent automotive events

Automotive Banner Shipping Coverage

Standard UPS Ground provides 1-3 day delivery to 90% of the United States for automotive banner orders. Automotive banners are produced at our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities based on optimal delivery location.

International Automotive Banner Shipping

International automotive banner shipping available with customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation. USPS and UPS labels accepted for international automotive banner delivery.

Automotive Banner Shipping Policies

  • Tracking numbers provided once automotive banners ship
  • Shipping costs determined by weight and automotive banner destination
  • Lost automotive banners replaced after shipping company confirms loss (7-10 business days)
  • Damaged automotive banners must be returned for replacement processing

Questions about automotive banner shipping? Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 before placing your order.

Car Dealership & Automotive Service Uses for Custom Banners

Automotive banners serve multiple marketing purposes for car dealerships, service centers, and automotive businesses. Explore popular applications for automotive banner advertising and promotion.

Car Dealership & Sales Applications

  • New Car Sales Events: Promote new model launches and seasonal automotive sales
  • Used Car Lot Advertising: Highlight inventory, pricing, and trade-in specials
  • Grand Opening Banners: Announce new dealership locations and automotive services

  • Trade-In Value Events: Promote enhanced trade-in values and automotive incentives

Automotive Service & Maintenance

  • Oil Change Specials: Promote regular automotive maintenance services
  • Tire Sales & Services: Advertise tire promotions and automotive tire services
  • Car Wash & Detailing: Market automotive cleaning and detailing services
  • Seasonal Services: Promote winter prep, summer maintenance automotive services
  • Warranty & Service Plans: Highlight extended automotive service options

Automotive Event & Promotional Uses

  • Car Shows & Displays: Professional automotive event signage and sponsorship
  • Clearance Events: End-of-year automotive inventory clearance promotions
  • Holiday Promotions: Seasonal automotive sales and holiday specials
  • Community Events: Local automotive business sponsorship and participation
  • Service Reminders: Maintenance scheduling and automotive service awareness

Automotive Business Categories

  • New & Used Car Dealerships
  • Automotive Service Centers
  • Auto Parts Stores
  • Car Wash & Detail Centers
  • Tire & Automotive Repair
  • Auto Body & Collision Repair
  • Automotive Rental Services
  • Classic Car Sales & Restoration
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Automotive Banner Artwork Requirements for Custom Printing

Professional artwork guidelines ensure your automotive banners print with crisp text, vibrant colors, and clear automotive graphics that effectively promote your dealership or service center.

Optimal Automotive Banner File Formats

  • .EPS files converted to outline: Best quality for automotive banner text and logos
  • High-resolution .PDF files: Excellent for automotive promotional graphics
  • High-resolution .JPG files: Suitable for automotive photography and images
  • High-resolution .TIFF files: Professional quality for detailed automotive graphics

Automotive Banner Design Specifications

  • Resolution: 300 DPI or higher for sharp automotive banner printing
  • Color Mode: CMYK color mode for accurate automotive brand colors
  • File Size: Maximum 60 MB file upload (contact us for larger automotive files)
  • Bleed Area: Include 0.125" bleed around automotive banner artwork

Automotive Banner Artwork Proofing

Order Proofs: Review your automotive banner artwork and order details before production. Includes low-resolution automotive banner preview and complete order summary with pricing and shipping information.

Color Match Proof System: For color-critical automotive banners requiring exact brand color matching, our Color Match Proof System ensures precise automotive color reproduction. Contact customer service for color-critical automotive banner projects.

Automotive Banner Design Assistance

Unsure about your automotive banner file quality? Our professional graphic designers specialize in automotive banner design and can help optimize your artwork for the best printing results.

Professional Automotive Banner Design Services Available:

  • Custom automotive banner layout and design
  • Automotive logo integration and sizing
  • Text optimization for car lot visibility
  • Color correction for automotive brand compliance
  • File format conversion and optimization

Need help with automotive banner artwork? Contact our design team for professional assistance with your automotive banner project.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Automotive Banner FAQ

What's the best material for outdoor automotive banners?

For car lot installations and outdoor automotive use, we recommend 13 oz vinyl (matte or gloss) or 18 oz heavy-duty vinyl for maximum durability. Mesh automotive banners work best in windy car lot conditions due to their 37% airflow design.

How long do automotive banners last outdoors?

High-quality vinyl automotive banners typically last 2-3 years outdoors with proper installation and normal weather exposure. Heavy-duty 18 oz material provides the longest lifespan for permanent car lot installations.

Can you match my dealership's brand colors exactly?

Yes! Our Color Match Proof System ensures precise automotive brand color reproduction. Contact customer service with your specific automotive brand color requirements (PMS, RGB, or CMYK values).

What size automotive banner works best for car lot visibility?

Popular automotive banner sizes include 3'x8', 4'x10', and 5'x15' for car lot fence installation. Larger sizes like 4'x20' or 6'x20' work well for building-mounted automotive displays. Size depends on your specific car lot layout and viewing distance.

Do you offer templates specifically for automotive businesses?

Yes! We have numerous automotive banner templates including designs for car sales, oil change services, tire promotions, grand openings, and more. Browse our automotive category in the template selector above.

How should I install automotive banners on my car lot fence?

For fence installation, choose hems and grommets finishing. Use zip ties, bungee cords, or banner clips to secure grommets to chain link fencing. Ensure banner is taut to prevent wind damage and maintain professional appearance.

Can automotive banners be double-sided for maximum visibility?

Yes, we create double-sided automotive banners up to 150 square feet. Double-sided banners are perfect for car lot corners or pole-mounted displays where the banner can be viewed from multiple directions.

What's the difference between automotive banner materials?

13 oz matte vinyl offers professional appearance with low glare, 13 oz gloss vinyl provides vibrant colors with high shine, 18 oz vinyl delivers maximum durability, mesh banners prevent wind damage, and fabric banners create upscale indoor showroom displays.

How fast can I get automotive banners for an urgent car sales event?

We offer 1-day priority production for urgent automotive banner needs. Combined with overnight shipping, you can receive automotive banners within 2-3 business days. Contact customer service for same-day emergency production availability.

Do you offer volume pricing for automotive dealer groups?

Yes! We provide special pricing for automotive dealer groups, chains, and large quantity orders. Contact us for a custom quote with volume automotive banner pricing and coordinated delivery to multiple dealership locations.
